name: postmark-webhooks-local
description: Local Express app for Postmark outbound stats and webhook capture.

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n api,webhooks -c green,blue "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:webhooks"
scripts.check: node --check src/config.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/webhooks.js && node --check scripts/config.js && node --check scripts/postmark-client.js && node --check scripts/postmark-webhook-registrar.js && node --check scripts/dev-services.js && npm run lint
